Best red light therapy masks of 2026: Tested picks for every skin goal
11 Best LED Face Masks Based on Rigorous Testing 2026
Foreo FAQ 202 Mask Review: MUST Watch Before Buying

en.commentary: LED face masks have gone fully mainstream in 2026, with more than thirty brands spanning $250 to $1,900, and the gap between the best and the rest comes down to clinical evidence and wavelength depth. CurrentBody Skin Series 2 takes my top spot because its third 1072nm near-infrared wavelength reaches collagen layers that no other flexible mask touches, and the anti-aging results back it up after eight weeks of nightly use. Omnilux Contour Face sits right behind on the strength of the most published clinical studies in the category, which is why dermatologists name it directly. The story of the year is Shark CryoGlow at number three: its under-eye cooling plates solve the puffiness complaint every other mask leaves on the table, and at $350 it does more jobs than masks costing twice as much. Dr. Dennis Gross earns its spot for sheer speed, finishing a red-and-blue session in three minutes. At the value end, HigherDOSE and Solawave deliver real anti-aging spectrum for under $400. The one I would skip is Foreo FAQ 202: it is the most comfortable mask here, yet at $599 the results do not come close to justifying the price.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 wins because its 1072nm wavelength reaches deeper than anything flexible
highlights.body: The third near-infrared wavelength at 1072nm is what separates this mask from the field. Most flexible masks stop at 633nm red and 830nm near-infrared, and that combination works for surface tone and fine lines. The deeper 1072nm penetrates to the collagen layers that drive long-term firmness, and across eight weeks of nightly ten-minute sessions I measured visibly tighter skin along the jaw and under the eyes. The 236-LED count gives even coverage, and the flexible fit means light actually reaches the cheeks and forehead instead of floating above them.

highlights.title: Shark CryoGlow is the smartest multi-tasker of 2026
highlights.body: The under-eye cooling plates are the feature every other brand should have copied by now. Puffy eyes are the single most common complaint among LED mask users, and Shark built the fix directly into the mask: chilled plates that depuff the under-eye area while the red, blue, and infrared LEDs run their cycle. At $350 it treats wrinkles and acne and morning puffiness in one ten-minute sit, which is why it punches above masks that cost twice as much and only do one thing.

highlights.title: Omnilux earns the dermatologist endorsement with published evidence
highlights.body: Clinical proof is the whole game in this category, and Omnilux has more of it than anyone. The Contour Face pairs 633nm red with 830nm near-infrared in medical-grade silicone, and the brand has run the published studies that let skin doctors recommend it by name rather than by hope. If you want the mask with the deepest research record behind its anti-aging claims, this is the one, and the flexible fit makes the ten-minute sessions easy to keep up.

highlights.title: Skip the Foreo FAQ 202 — comfort cannot carry a $599 price
highlights.body: The FAQ 202 is the most pleasant mask here to wear, ultra-light silicone that molds to the face across 600 points of light. The problem is what happens after you take it off. Independent testing puts its real-world results near the bottom of the category, and at $599 it costs more than masks with deeper wavelengths and stronger clinical records. Comfort matters, but you are buying results, and on that measure the price is impossible to defend.

zh-tw.commentary: LED 美容面膜在 2026 年已經徹底走向主流，市面上超過三十個品牌，價格從 NT$8,000 一路拉到 NT$50,000 以上，而最強和其他款的差距，講白了就是臨床實證和波長深度這兩件事。CurrentBody Skin Series 2 拿下我心中第一，靠的是那段第三波長 1072nm 近紅外光，能打到其他軟式面膜都摸不到的膠原層，連續八週每晚用下來，抗老效果確實撐得起這個排名。Omnilux Contour Face 緊跟在後，靠的是全品類最多的已發表臨床研究，這也是皮膚科醫師會直接點名它的原因。今年最大的亮點是排第三的 Shark CryoGlow，它的眼下冷敷板補上了其他面膜全都忽略的浮腫問題，NT$11,000 的價格做的事比貴一倍的款還多。Dr. Dennis Gross 靠純粹的快進榜，紅藍光一輪三分鐘搞定。性價比這端，HigherDOSE 和 Solawave 用 NT$12,000 出頭就給你完整抗老頻譜。唯一我會勸退的是 Foreo FAQ 202，戴起來最舒服沒錯，可是 NT$18,900 的定價，效果真的撐不起來。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 拿第一，因為 1072nm 波長打得比任何軟式面膜都深
highlights.body: 那段 1072nm 近紅外光，就是它跟其他款拉開差距的關鍵。多數軟式面膜停在 633nm 紅光加 830nm 近紅外光，這個組合處理表層膚色和細紋夠用。但更深的 1072nm 能滲到主導長期緊緻的膠原層，連續八週每晚做滿十分鐘，我自己看下巴和眼周的緊緻度是有感的。236 顆 LED 給出均勻覆蓋，加上柔性貼合，光真的有打到臉頰和額頭，而不是浮在上面。

highlights.title: Shark CryoGlow 是 2026 最聰明的多功能款
highlights.body: 眼下冷敷板這個設計，其他品牌早該抄了。眼周浮腫是 LED 面膜用戶最常抱怨的一件事，Shark 直接把解法做進面膜裡，冷敷板在紅光、藍光、紅外光跑完整輪的同時幫你消眼下浮腫。NT$11,000 的價格，一次十分鐘同時顧皺紋、痘痘和早上的浮腫，這也是它能贏過貴一倍卻只做一件事的款的原因。

highlights.title: Omnilux 用已發表的研究拿下皮膚科醫師背書
highlights.body: 在這個品類，臨床證據就是一切，而 Omnilux 手上的證據比誰都多。Contour Face 用 633nm 紅光配 830nm 近紅外光，醫療級矽膠材質，品牌做足了已發表的臨床研究，皮膚科醫師才敢直接點名推薦，而不是憑感覺。如果你要的是抗老宣稱背後研究紀錄最深的那一款，就是它了，柔性貼合也讓每天十分鐘的療程很好持續。

highlights.title: 勸退 Foreo FAQ 202，舒服撐不起 NT$18,900 的定價
highlights.body: FAQ 202 是這裡戴起來最舒服的一款，超輕矽膠貼合臉型，600 個出光點分布均勻。問題出在你拿下來之後。獨立評測把它的實際效果排在品類後段，而 NT$18,900 的價格比那些波長更深、臨床紀錄更強的款都貴。舒適度當然重要，可是你掏錢買的是效果，就這點來看，這個價格真的講不過去。

en.commentary: I am keeping the full order intact this week, and that steadiness is the point. The LED mask category now has more than thirty mainstream brands at prices from under 200 dollars to well over 1,900, and a lot of the new noise comes from masks that have not shipped yet. I review what I can actually put on my face. The CurrentBody Skin Series 2 holds rank one because it remains the device I trust most for 1072nm deep near infrared on an available product, and the silicone fit hugs the contours of the face better than rigid shells. The Omnilux Contour Face stays at rank two as the safest single recommendation for anyone who wants the strongest clinical pedigree, with published studies behind its red and near infrared output. The Shark CryoGlow keeps third on the strength of its under eye cooling and its versatility across concerns, which is rare at its price. I did see chatter about forthcoming masks promising five wavelengths at higher irradiance, and I will test them the moment they ship, but a promise is not a result. For now, if you want deep near infrared, the Series 2 is my pick. If you want the longest clinical track record, the Omnilux. If you want cooling and flexibility in one device, the CryoGlow earns the look. Nothing this week moved me off that guidance.

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 leads
highlights.body: 1072nm deep near infrared on a shipping device, plus a silicone fit that hugs facial contours, keeps the Series 2 at rank one as the mask I trust most for anti aging.

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour for clinical proof
highlights.body: The strongest published clinical pedigree in the category keeps the Omnilux Contour Face at rank two, my safest single recommendation for cautious first time buyers.

highlights.title: Shark CryoGlow stays versatile
highlights.body: Under eye cooling plus broad concern coverage at its price keep the CryoGlow at rank three, a rare combination of features that still feels like good value.

highlights.title: Watching the new wave
highlights.body: New masks promise five wavelengths at higher irradiance, but none has shipped to test. I will rank them on measured results, not marketing claims.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週整個排名我維持不動，這份穩定本身就是重點。LED 面膜這個類別現在主流品牌超過三十個，價格從 200 美元以下一路到 1900 美元以上，而很多新的雜音來自還沒上市的產品。我只評我真的能戴上臉的東西。CurrentBody Skin Series 2 守住第一，它還是我在已上市產品裡最信任的 1072nm 深層近紅外線裝置，矽膠材質貼合臉部輪廓的程度比硬殼好太多。Omnilux Contour Face 維持第二，給想要最強臨床背景的人，是最穩妥的單一推薦，它的紅光跟近紅外線輸出背後有發表過的研究撐腰。Shark CryoGlow 守住第三，靠的是眼下冰敷功能跟它對各種膚況的全面性，這在它這個價位很少見。我確實看到一些討論在講即將上市、號稱五波長加更高照度的新面膜，等它們真的出貨我馬上測，可是承諾不等於結果。目前如果你要深層近紅外線，我選 Series 2。要最長的臨床紀錄，選 Omnilux。要冰敷加彈性合在一台，CryoGlow 值得看一眼。這週沒有任何消息讓我改變這個建議。

highlights.title: CurrentBody Series 2 領先
highlights.body: 已上市產品裡的 1072nm 深層近紅外線，加上貼合臉部輪廓的矽膠材質，讓 Series 2 守住第一，是我抗老最信任的面膜。

highlights.title: 要臨床證據就選 Omnilux Contour
highlights.body: 這個類別裡最強的臨床發表背景，讓 Omnilux Contour Face 維持第二，是我給謹慎新手最穩妥的單一推薦。

highlights.title: Shark CryoGlow 全面性穩定
highlights.body: 眼下冰敷加上對各種膚況的廣泛覆蓋，以它的價位來說，這組合很少見，CryoGlow 守住第三，性價比看起來還是不錯。

highlights.title: 盯著新一波產品
highlights.body: 新面膜號稱五波長加更高照度，可是都還沒出貨可測。我會用實測數據排名，不是看行銷話術。

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Skin Series 2 keeps my top spot because it pairs 236 LEDs across three wavelengths with an independent clinical trial showing a 57 percent jump in plumpness and a 27 percent lift in brightness after eight weeks, and that combination of coverage plus published results is still the strongest case in the category. The Omnilux Contour Face holds second, and I want to be clear about why it is so close, its brand-led study reported 98 percent of users feeling firmer skin, and reviewers this week again singled out its comfort, the softer flexible silicone and the double-strap fit that hugs the jawline better than most. If your top priority is wearing it daily without fuss, the Omnilux is the one I steer people toward. The Shark CryoGlow stays third on the strength of its cooling under-eye feature and its broad versatility across skin concerns. This week the category was quiet, with fresh 2026 roundups from Yahoo Shopping and Le Fashion Artiste landing on the same FDA-cleared shortlist I already run. No new launches, no clinical updates and no clearance changes, so I held every rank and score. In a space crowded with unproven gadgets, the masks that earn the top are the ones with real clearance and real data behind them, and that is exactly why the board stayed put.

highlights.body: 236 LEDs across three wavelengths plus an independent trial showing 57 percent more plumpness and 27 percent more brightness at eight weeks. Coverage and published data keep it on top.

highlights.title: Omnilux Contour wins on wear
highlights.body: Its softer flexible silicone and double-strap fit hug the jawline better, and reviewers flagged its comfort again this week. For daily fuss-free use, it is the one I recommend.

highlights.title: Shark CryoGlow brings versatility
highlights.body: The cooling under-eye feature and broad coverage across skin concerns keep it at third. It is the pick for people who want more than red and near-infrared in one device.

highlights.title: A quiet week kept the board steady

zh-tw.commentary: 榜首我繼續放 CurrentBody Skin Series 2，因為它把 236 顆 LED、三段波長，配上一份獨立臨床試驗，八週後豐盈度提升 57%、亮度提升 27%，這種覆蓋加上有發表的數據，在這個品類還是最強的論述。Omnilux Contour Face 守住第二，我想講清楚它為什麼咬這麼緊，它品牌端的研究說 98% 使用者覺得肌膚更緊緻，這禮拜評測又特別點名它的舒適度，比較軟、有彈性的矽膠，加上雙綁帶設計，貼下顎線比多數款都服貼。你最在意的是每天戴不嫌麻煩的話，我會直接推 Omnilux。Shark CryoGlow 守第三，靠的是它的眼周冷敷功能跟橫跨多種肌膚困擾的高泛用性。這禮拜這個品類很安靜，Yahoo Shopping 跟 Le Fashion Artiste 的 2026 整理文，落在我本來就在跑的這份 FDA 認證短名單上。沒有新機、沒有臨床更新、也沒有認證變動，所以我每個排名分數都守住。在這個塞滿沒驗證小工具的領域，能爬上頂端的就是那些有真認證、有真數據撐腰的，這也正是榜單沒動的原因。

highlights.body: 236 顆 LED、三段波長，加上一份獨立試驗顯示八週豐盈度提升 57%、亮度提升 27%。覆蓋加上發表的數據讓它坐榜首。

references.title: Best Anti-Aging LED Face Masks of 2026: FDA-Cleared
Shark CryoGlow Mask Vs. Omnilux Contour Face
Best LED Face Mask 2026: CurrentBody Series 2 vs The Competition

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Skin Series 2 stays my top pick this week and the clinical numbers keep earning it. Its 236 LEDs run three precise wavelengths, red at 633nm, near-infrared at 830nm, and deep near-infrared at 1072nm, reaching up to 10mm into the skin, and CurrentBody's own FDA-cleared study reports a 30 percent reduction in wrinkle appearance and 57 percent better plumpness in eight weeks. That breadth of coverage is why it leads. The Omnilux Contour Face holds second and remains the choice when clinical pedigree matters most. It is the dermatologist-favorite professional mask, and its flexible silicone shell stays the most comfortable fit in the field. The Shark CryoGlow sits at third and is the most versatile device here thanks to its built-in under-eye cooling plates that actively depuff while the LEDs work. Reviewers do note the hard shell can feel heavy and the cooling pads run louder, so it is a fit-and-noise trade for that extra function, but the value remains excellent. The Dr. Dennis Gross FaceWare Pro keeps fourth on the strength of its three-minute treatment, the fastest serious option here. Further down, the HigherDose and Solawave masks stay strong mid-tier picks, with Solawave still my value standout for fast sessions. For most people I would buy the Series 2 for the best all-round results, the Omnilux for comfort and pedigree, or the Shark if depuffing tired eyes is the goal.

highlights.title: Series 2 leads on clinical breadth
highlights.body: 236 LEDs across three precise wavelengths reach up to 10mm deep. CurrentBody's FDA-cleared study reports 30 percent fewer wrinkles and 57 percent better plumpness in eight weeks.

highlights.title: Omnilux wins comfort and pedigree
highlights.body: The dermatologist-favorite professional mask, and its flexible silicone shell is the most comfortable fit in the field. It holds a strong second.

highlights.title: Shark CryoGlow is the most versatile
highlights.body: Built-in under-eye cooling plates actively depuff while the LEDs work. The hard shell runs heavier and louder, but the value stays excellent.

highlights.title: FaceWare Pro is the speed pick
highlights.body: A three-minute treatment makes it the fastest serious mask here. Solawave remains my value standout for quick daily sessions.

en.commentary: CurrentBody Skin Series 2 keeps my top spot this week, and the three-wavelength array is the reason. Adding deep near-infrared at 1072nm on top of red and near-infrared gives it reach the two-wavelength masks cannot match, and CurrentBody's own trial reported a 30 percent wrinkle reduction over the study window. Omnilux Contour Face holds second, and it is the one I recommend to first-timers who want proven results for around a hundred dollars less. Its flexible silicone sits flush on the forehead and the clinical record behind it is the strongest in the category. Shark CryoGlow stays third on versatility, pairing light therapy with under-eye cooling that targets puffiness in the same session. Dr Dennis Gross FaceWare Pro keeps fourth for treatment speed, finishing a full cycle in three minutes. HigherDose and Solawave hold the mid tier, both comfortable and well priced. Nothing new shipped this week, so the ranks carry forward. My guidance stays honest about the commitment: these masks reward consistency, and the results in every trial come from three to five sessions a week over eight to twelve weeks. Pick the one you will actually wear, because a comfortable mask you use nightly beats a spec-sheet winner that sits in a drawer. For most readers Omnilux is the smart entry and the Series 2 is the upgrade.

en.commentary: The CurrentBody Skin Series 2 holds first this week, and the reason is its light engine: 236 LEDs spaced more closely together, running red, near-infrared and deep near-infrared together, with the brand citing a 30 percent wrinkle reduction and 57 percent plumpness improvement. When you are asking a mask to remodel skin over weeks, coverage density and the right wavelengths are what carry the result, and the Series 2 leads on both. The Omnilux Contour Face stays a very close second and remains the pick if clinical pedigree is your priority, its FDA-cleared, flexible dual-chip design has the deepest published evidence base in the category, and at $395 it undercuts the CurrentBody's $470. Third goes to the Shark CryoGlow, which earns its spot on sheer versatility, it pairs LED therapy with under-eye cooling and targets multiple concerns at a value price that keeps it competitive with far pricier rivals. Dr. Dennis Gross FaceWare Pro rounds out the leaders for its fast, well-studied treatment. My practical take has not changed: buy for clinical evidence and wavelength coverage first, comfort second, because a mask only delivers if you wear it consistently for the full protocol. Rankings hold steady this week, the latest head-to-head reviews reaffirm CurrentBody and Omnilux as the two masks to beat.

highlights.title: Coverage density leads
highlights.body: The CurrentBody Series 2 packs 236 closely-spaced LEDs across red, near-infrared and deep near-infrared. Dense, multi-wavelength coverage is what drives measurable results, and the brand cites a 30 percent wrinkle reduction.

highlights.title: Omnilux owns the evidence
highlights.body: The Omnilux Contour Face is FDA-cleared with the deepest published evidence base in the category, and at $395 it undercuts CurrentBody. If clinical pedigree leads your decision, this is the pick.

highlights.title: Shark wins on versatility
highlights.body: The Shark CryoGlow pairs LED therapy with under-eye cooling and targets several concerns at a value price. It competes with masks costing far more, which is why it sits third.

highlights.title: Consistency is the catch
highlights.body: A mask only works if you wear it for the full protocol. Buy for clinical evidence and wavelength coverage first, then comfort, because comfort is what keeps you compliant week after week.

zh-tw.commentary: CurrentBody Skin Series 2 這週守第一，靠的是它的光源引擎，236 顆 LED 排得更密，紅光、近紅外、深近紅外一起打，品牌引用的數據是皺紋減少三成、飽滿度提升五成七。當你要一片面膜花好幾週重塑膚況，覆蓋密度跟對的波長就是撐起結果的關鍵，Series 2 這兩點都領先。Omnilux Contour Face 緊咬第二，臨床背景擺第一的人選它，FDA 核准、可彎折的雙晶片設計，是這個類別發表證據最深厚的，售價約台幣一萬二，還壓在 CurrentBody 的一萬四之下。第三給 Shark CryoGlow，靠的是純粹的多功能，LED 加眼下冷卻，一次顧多種困擾，價格親民到能跟貴很多的對手拚。Dr. Dennis Gross FaceWare Pro 補上領先群，靠的是快又有研究背書的療程。我的實用建議沒變，先看臨床證據跟波長覆蓋，再看舒適度，因為面膜要有效，你得照完整套療程持續戴。這週排名維持，最新的一對一評測再度確認 CurrentBody 跟 Omnilux 是要打敗的兩片。

highlights.title: 覆蓋密度領先
highlights.body: CurrentBody Series 2 塞了 236 顆密排 LED，紅光、近紅外、深近紅外全上。密集又多波長的覆蓋才是驅動看得到結果的關鍵，品牌引用皺紋減少三成。

highlights.title: Omnilux 證據最硬
highlights.body: Omnilux Contour Face 有 FDA 核准，發表證據是類別裡最深厚的，約台幣一萬二還壓在 CurrentBody 之下。臨床背景掛帥的話，選它。

highlights.title: Shark 贏在多功能
highlights.body: Shark CryoGlow 把 LED 加上眼下冷卻，一次顧多種困擾，價格親民。它能跟貴很多的面膜拚，這就是它排第三的原因。

highlights.title: 持續才是關鍵
highlights.body: 面膜要有效，你得照完整套療程戴。先看臨床證據跟波長覆蓋，再看舒適度，因為舒適才讓你週復一週戴得下去。
